mapper.insert: INSERT INTO offi_complex (name, sido, sigungu, dong, bjdong_code) VALUES (#{name}, #{sido}, #{sigungu}, #{dong}, #{bjdongCode}) ON CONFLICT (name, bjdong_code) DO NOTHING
mapper.update: UPDATE offi_complex SET lat = #{lat}, lng = #{lng} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO offi_trade (complex_id, deal_year, deal_month, deal_day, area, floor, price) VALUES (#{complexId}, #{dealYear}, #{dealMonth}, #{dealDay}, #{area}, #{floor}, #{price})

INSERT INTO offi_rent (complex_id, rent_type, deal_year, deal_month, area, floor, deposit, monthly_rent) VALUES (#{complexId}, #{rentType}, #{dealYear}, #{dealMonth}, #{area}, #{floor}, #{deposit}, #{monthlyRent})
